falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 52-week high by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant breakout would invalidate the HOLD signal, indicating a strong bullish trend contrary to the current unknown verdict.
A blowoff score above 60 would confirm a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the current HOLD and UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200% above the 30-day average while price rises 15% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume and price would indicate strong buying pressure, invalidating the HOLD signal and suggesting a confirmed trend reversal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
